metadata.caller_python_policy: Bridge callers may use Python 3.11 or 3.12; backend Python is model-specific and hidden behind adapters/workers.
metadata.policy: Prefer the latest maintained runtime and add narrow bridge patches before preserving old project environments.

models.notes: Verified in latest ai env with this repo bridge smoke: generator loads BF16 directly to CUDA via safetensors device_map, selected SageAttention2 (`sageattention==2.2.0`) on RTX 3090, allocated about 10.1GB, and prompt-cache-only set_prompts path returns cached BF16 embeddings without loading T5. Do not install sageattn3 for RTX 3090; it is Blackwell-only.
Skip tokenizer/text_encoder on the hot path and pass cached prompt embeddings; FAR transformer forward needs tuple padding when return_dict is false.
Use cached prompt embeddings and keep UMT5 loading out of request-time inference.
Synthetic ONNX CPU smoke emits emotion logits shape [1, 6] using sidecar OPT_BUFFER_LEN=30000.

Model-aware ONNX bridge runs v2.3 Mark on CPU in ai with audio input [1, 1, 8320], emotion input [1, 1, 26], and geometry result [1, 1, 301] partitioned as 272 skin blendshapes, 10 tongue blendshapes, 15 jaw values, and 4 eye values from sidecars.
ONNX contract and sidecars inspect successfully, but full synthetic execution is deferred because the diffusion noise/output tensor has width 88831 and needs a bounded preprocessing contract.

Verified in latest ai env by loading the vendored BigVGAN source/checkpoint with use_cuda_kernel=false, removing weight norm, and running a synthetic [1,128,4] mel tensor to a [1,1,2048] waveform at 44.1kHz.
Component schema validates, but pipeline-level device_map assigns the large BF16 transformer to CPU; needs component-level placement and cached prompt embeddings.
Full placement and 256x256 1-step latent generation verified in ai with device_map=balanced and max_memory.
FP32 text embedding smoke now passes in ai with modeling_utils legacy helper shims; text_proj_shape=[1, 768].
Patch stale Cosmos3OmniDiffusersPipeline metadata to upstream Cosmos3OmniPipeline or use LightX2V lazy path; bounded 256px/1-step t2i passes.
Transformers 4.57.6 does not recognize model_type cwm, local remote-code files are absent, and checkpoint shards are incomplete.

consolidation_blockers: optimized lazy LLM placement/offload bridge pending; bounded DescribeAnythingModel inference is verified but uses the self-contained eager wrapper
models.notes: Repo-owned DAM bridge loads vision_tower, mm_projector, context_provider, and LlamaTokenizer for DAM-3B, DAM-3B-Self-Contained, and DAM-3B-Video in ai. DAM-3B-Self-Contained full AutoModel eager load succeeds on CUDA, and the legacy DescribeAnythingModel wrapper produces a bounded image/mask description in ai; optimized lazy LLM placement/offload remains the next performance step.
DINOv2 base loads through AutoImageProcessor/AutoModel in latest Transformers; zero-image fp16 CUDA smoke emitted last_hidden_state [1, 1370, 768] at artifact image_size 518.
DINOv2 large loads through AutoImageProcessor/AutoModel in latest Transformers; zero-image fp16 CUDA smoke emitted last_hidden_state [1, 1370, 1024] at artifact image_size 518.
BART large CNN loads through AutoTokenizer/AutoModelForSeq2SeqLM in latest Transformers 4.57.6; bounded CUDA smoke generated text with min_length override for short bridge validation.
HuBERT base loads through AutoFeatureExtractor/AutoModel without tokenizer assets; zero-audio fp16 CUDA smoke emitted last_hidden_state [1, 49, 768].
HuBERT large loads through AutoFeatureExtractor/AutoModel without tokenizer assets; zero-audio fp16 CUDA smoke emitted last_hidden_state [1, 49, 1024].
Use official hy3dgen in ai and normalize output as GLB through the bridge artifact boundary.
Assets are present but require Omni-specific runtime/control bridge, not LightX2V Hunyuan3D 2.x shape route.

consolidation_blockers: Full optimized BF16/FSDP generation on RTX 3090 needs two nearly empty 24 GiB GPUs; v15 failed only because one selected GPU had a 4.2 GiB resident process.
FP8/FSDP2 remains available for SM90+ hardware, but RTX 3090/SM86 cannot execute FP8 distributed collectives.
models.notes: ai has native flash_attn 2.8.3.post1. The bridge now handles LLaVA image-token expansion, Diffusers non-output rank behavior, Torch 2.10 FSDP2 _FlatLayout/_MeshLayout pickle compatibility, FP8 FSDP2 key remapping, Transformers LLaVA LlamaModel.model compatibility, hardware-aware FP8-vs-BF16 routing, import-time CPU_OFFLOAD, VAE cache prewarm, and reference-frame cache sizing. BF16 FSDP smokes in ai now pass prewarm/cache/token-layout stages and reach denoising; the remaining blocker is clean GPU memory, not legacy dependency mismatch.

consolidation_blockers: spconv and kaolin remain optional legacy parity items, not default flex_gemm blockers
models.notes: Legacy trellis env was deleted to free disk space. The default TRELLIS.2 ai path now imports nvdiffrast 0.4.0, cumesh 0.0.1, flex_gemm 1.0.0, bundled o_voxel 0.0.1, Open3D 0.19.0, and flash-attn 2.8.3.post1, then completes a real-image one-step GLB smoke. Worker commands preload system libstdc++ for CuMesh GLIBCXX_3.4.30. spconv and kaolin are tracked as optional legacy parity.
4-token CUDA generation smoke passes in ai through legacy_model_bridge.runtime.causal_lm with slow LlamaTokenizer fallback and use_cache=false.
4-token CUDA generation smoke passes in ai through legacy_model_bridge.runtime.causal_lm with slow LlamaTokenizer fallback and use_cache=false.
Classic MobileLLM 350M now has direct CUDA generation proof in ai with slow LlamaTokenizer fallback and use_cache=false; default family matrix bug for 125M sibling separation is fixed and tested.
Bounded fp16 CUDA generate smoke emitted [1, 1, 3200] audio at 32kHz through latest Transformers MusicgenForConditionalGeneration.
Bounded fp16 CUDA generate smoke emitted [1, 1, 3200] audio at 32kHz through latest Transformers MusicgenForConditionalGeneration.
Bounded fp16 CUDA generate smoke emitted [1, 2, 3200] audio at 32kHz through latest Transformers MusicgenForConditionalGeneration.
Bounded fp16 CUDA generate smoke emitted [1, 2, 3200] audio at 32kHz through latest Transformers MusicgenForConditionalGeneration.
Bounded fp16 CUDA generate smoke emitted [1, 2, 3200] stereo audio at 32kHz through latest Transformers MusicgenMelodyForConditionalGeneration with bridge melody class dispatch.
Bounded fp16 CUDA generate smoke emitted [1, 2, 3200] audio at 32kHz through latest Transformers MusicgenForConditionalGeneration.

consolidation_blockers: official runtime pins Python 3.10 cu128 stack with flash-attn/natten/transformer-engine
models.notes: Official Cosmos 2.5 runtime imports validate with local BF16 repo-format .pt artifacts; generation/offload validation pending.

consolidation_blockers: official runtime pins Python 3.10 cu128 stack with flash-attn/natten/transformer-engine
ai env missing official Cosmos parity imports: natten, transformer_engine, cosmos_transfer2.config, cosmos_transfer2.inference
models.notes: Official Transfer 2.5 distilled edge generation is verified through the student-only bridge worker on one 24 GiB GPU with 93-frame/1-step smoke; ai parity imports remain blocked.

NeMo ASR worker is verified in ai on Python 3.11/Torch 2.10.0+cu128. Current archive inspection proves all ranked older ASR .nemo targets are import-ready in ai; parakeet-tdt_ctc-110m has load/transcribe/warm service proof, parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3 has CUDA load-only proof, parakeet-unified-en-0.6b has warm transcription proof through context-config and validation_ds bridge patches, and nemotron-3.5-asr-streaming-0.6b has prompt-shim restore/warm transcription proof.
BERT classifier head shape is authoritative over stale config.num_labels.
AutoModelForImageSegmentation remote-code load runs as BiRefNet in ai after adding kornia; 256x256 CUDA FP32 forward smoke passes with output_shape=[1, 1, 8, 8].
Two-stage LingBot World layout through LightX2V bridge with high/low-noise assembly; bounded generation pending.
Route through LightX2V bridge with model_cls=lingbot_world_fast, local transformer shards, shared UMT5, cached prompt embeddings; bounded generation pending.

Bridge-owned ai inspector validates the local Wan Animate checkpoint layout, cached T5 prompt context, cached VAE control latents, SageAttention2 selection on RTX 3090, and the 40-block INT8/offload artifact contract. Historical generated MP4/cache artifacts remain under /data/transformer_10; this repo owns the latest-env readiness contract.
CogVideoXPipeline BF16 load and minimal 9-frame/2-step generation smoke pass in ai after restoring missing T5 shard.
4-token CUDA generation smoke passes in ai through legacy_model_bridge.runtime.causal_lm with slow LlamaTokenizer fallback and use_cache=false.
4-token CUDA generation smoke passes in ai through legacy_model_bridge.runtime.causal_lm with slow LlamaTokenizer fallback and use_cache=false.
4-token CUDA generation smoke passes in ai with MobileLLM remote code, slow LlamaTokenizer fallback, and use_cache=false.
4-token CUDA generation smoke passes in ai as a LLaMA-shaped MobileLLM snapshot; slow LlamaTokenizer fallback is used, remote-code trust is false, and use_cache remains true.
4-token CUDA generation smoke passes directly in ai with current Transformers Llama4ForCausalLM, fast tokenizer, use_cache=true, and no bridge patch required.
4-token CUDA generation smoke passes directly in ai with current Transformers Llama4ForCausalLM, fast tokenizer, use_cache=true, and no bridge patch required.
4-token CUDA generation smoke passes directly in ai with current Transformers Llama4ForCausalLM, fast tokenizer, use_cache=true, and no bridge patch required.
4-token CUDA generation smoke passes in ai with MobileLLM-Pro remote code, fast tokenizer, and use_cache=false via the legacy cache bridge.
4-token CUDA generation smoke passes in ai with MobileLLM-Pro remote code, fast tokenizer, and use_cache=false via the legacy cache bridge.

consolidation_blockers: ai does not include an importable AudioCraft runtime; cloned AudioCraft source import currently fails on missing julius before AudioGen construction.
AudioCraft transformer_lm config has memory_efficient=true, so the latest-env loader still needs a bridge-owned torch SDPA/xformers compatibility strategy before generation smoke.
models.notes: AudioGen medium is inspected in ai as AudioCraft state_dict.bin plus compression_state_dict.bin solver checkpoints with embedded xp.cfg, 16kHz mono EnCodec, 4 codebooks, and transformer_lm weights. Latest ai has encodec/torch/torchaudio but not an importable AudioCraft runtime; probing /data/tmp/lmb_audiocraft_src currently fails at missing julius. Next bridge step is a latest-compatible AudioCraft loader or vendored minimal adapter with dependency shims and torch SDPA attention override, not a Transformers MusicGen loader.

4-token CUDA generation smoke passes in ai as a standard Transformers LlamaForCausalLM checkpoint; no remote code, no runtime quantization package, and no MobileLLM cache/tokenizer patches were required.
